message:
feat: multi-column page skip + BETWEEN filter with WASM range ops

- canSkipPageMultiCol: check ALL filter columns' min/max stats for page skip
  (was only checking first column — missed skips on non-first-column filters)
- Add BETWEEN filter op end-to-end: types, client (.whereBetween()), decode
  (matchesFilter + canSkipPage), WASM range filters, scan-time WASM path
- Add filterFloat64Range, filterInt32Range, filterInt64Range Zig exports
- canSkipPage handles BETWEEN: skip page if max < low or min > high
- WasmAggregateOperator uses multi-column page skip
